name_en: Neonoe BB new mini bucket bag | CODE:M46581
name_cn:
Neonoe BB new mini bucket bag | CODE:M46581
2023 Early Spring Collection [Exclusive Quality]
👜Size: 20*20*13cm
NÉONOÉ BB Mini new mini bucket bag,
is destined to be another bestseller,
its deeper size is very popular, and it features a top handle design,
showcasing a retro-modern charm throughout the bag body.
Launched on the official Chinese site in June, debuted in Korea 🇰🇷,
and is already in high demand, another must-have series!
